# CONTEXT.md Format

Use this file as a glossary only.
Do not include implementation details, timelines, tasks, or architecture specs.

## Suggested Structure

```markdown
# Domain Glossary

## Term: <Canonical Name>
- Definition: <One precise sentence>
- Boundaries: <What is included and excluded>
- Synonyms to avoid: <list>
- Related terms: <list>
- Example: <short domain example>
```

## Rules

- Prefer one canonical term per concept.
- Resolve overloaded language immediately.
- Keep entries concise and stable.
- Update entries incrementally as decisions are clarified.
